Share local data with peer (FixedPoint shares)

Source: R/k2InputSharingDS.R
k2ShareInputDS.Rd

Share local data with peer (FixedPoint shares)

Usage

k2ShareInputDS(
  data_name,
  x_vars,
  y_var = NULL,
  peer_pk,
  ring = 63L,
  session_id = NULL
)

Arguments

data_name

Character. Name of the data frame symbol on the server.

x_vars

Character vector. Non-label feature names on this server.

y_var

Character. Name of the outcome column on the label server.

peer_pk

Character (base64url). Peer party's transport public key for sealed shares.

ring

Integer 63 (default) or 127. Selects secret-share ring (task #116 Cox/LMM STRICT migration). Ring127 routes through 16-byte Uint128 records via k2-float-to-fp + k2-split-fp-share with ring="ring127"; Ring63 keeps the 8-byte pipeline.

session_id

Character. Active MPC session identifier.
